title: 3d Breaking X Visible Ores
description: A combination of two other packs, combined together for ease of use.
body:
This Resource pack is a combination of 2 packs, 3d breaking, and visble ores. Duh. 

Here's a video showing off the pack.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5OvapHBShco" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Make sure to use Continuity!
